commits: 1441890 - bober(sprint-1): MCP initialize handshake + tools/call envelope in TokensaveMcpClient

filesChanged.description: HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS=5000; private handshakeId; unwrapMcpContent() scans content[] for first JSON-parseable text + handles isError:true; spawnAndHandshake() writes initialize + resolves on correlated response + emits notifications/initialized; call() uses tools/call envelope + returns unwrapMcpContent(result)

hasTokensave() via node:child_process spawnSync; fakes reply to initialize by id; PendingMap tool responses wrapped as content[]; integration tests use process.cwd() root + tokensave_status; +8 unit tests (handshake-by-id, notifications ordering, tools/call envelope, content-unwrap incl. WARNING-then-JSON, plain-text string, isError/JSON-RPC error -> GRAPH_ERROR); +1 round-trip integration test

selfVerification.lint: exit 0 (2 pre-existing warnings in eval-persist.test.ts, not in changed files)

notes: unwrapMcpContent scans ALL content[] text entries and returns the first JSON-parseable one (live tokensave_status has content[0]='WARNING: ...' plain text, content[1]=JSON). Diverges from the literal 'first text entry' in the contract assumptions but matches the briefing §9 and is required for sc-1-7. Per-test 2s handshake-timeout waits make the file ~28s.
